mapper.select: SELECT room_id, hotel_id, room_type, bed_type, facilities, price, stock, status FROM t_hotel_room WHERE hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND status = 1
SELECT room_id, hotel_id, room_type, bed_type, facilities, price, stock, status FROM t_hotel_room WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_hotel_room SET stock = stock - #{quantity} WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND stock >= #{quantity}
UPDATE t_hotel_room SET stock = stock + #{quantity} WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_hotel_room (hotel_id, room_type, bed_type, facilities, price, stock) VALUES (#{hotelId}, #{roomType}, #{bedType}, #{facilities}, #{price}, #{stock})
